critique_1.title: Multiple Hypothesis Testing
critique_1.verdict: Statistical artifact — no real correlations survive correction

critique_2.title: CRC-16 on MAC[20:22]
critique_2.verdict: MAC[20:22] are likely device status/CRC, not SHA-1 output

critique_3.title: SAC vs Output Independence
critique_3.verdict: Terminology should be corrected; true SAC requires chosen inputs

critique_4.title: AES Block Mode Determination
critique_4.verdict: AES-CTR most likely; CBC contradicts non-block-aligned ciphertext
